---
title: "Week 9: Object-oriented programming (vctrs)"
---

```{r}
week <- 9
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

## Main references

* [13 *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/s3.html)
* [vctrs](https://vctrs.r-lib.org)

## What you will learn this week

* Overview of vctrs, a modern approach to creating new S3 vector classes in R.

## Pre-class activities

* Watch [vctrs: Tools for making size and type consistent functions](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8_QoT3ygdI4)
* Watch [vctrs: Creating custom vector classes with the vctrs package](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UHwp8T_fmEI)

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_slides(week)
```

```{r}
#| output: asis
show_assignments(week)
```
